name: @tangleclaw/openclaw-ebay-research
description: Read-only eBay market research for your OpenClaw agent — search live listings, fetch item detail, look up categories, query sold-listing history. Direct REST via client_credentials OAuth, app token only. No seller account, no user OAuth, no MCP server. Every result ships with a clickable itemWebUrl.
author: Jason Vaughan

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
